assertions.title: Product line page has visual comparison chart

steps.observed: Page loaded successfully, 0 console errors

steps.expected: SVG chart comparing product lines side-by-side
steps.observed: SVG with viewBox='0 0 1000 400' found. Title '产品线机会与风险对比'. 4 product lines (上装, 下装, 外套, 配饰) shown side-by-side with horizontal bars.

steps.action: Check chart has bars for each product line
steps.expected: Each product line has comparison bars
steps.observed: 10 rect elements: 8 data bars (2 per product line for opportunity and risk) + 2 legend color swatches. Axis labels 0-100.

evidence.domInspection: SVG viewBox='0 0 1000 400', 10 rects, 20 text elements, 5 lines. Product lines: 上装, 下装, 外套, 配饰 all represented.

assertions.title: Comparison chart shows opportunity and risk

steps.expected: Different colors for opportunity and risk
steps.observed: Green (#10b981) bars for opportunity, Red (#ef4444) bars for risk. Each product line has one green and one red bar.

steps.expected: Legend distinguishes 机会 vs 风险
steps.observed: Legend present with green rect + '机会' and red rect + '风险'. Legend swatches at (0,0) and (0,25) with text at (25,10) and (25,35).
All bars show value 50 (matching data: opportunity_level=中, risk_level=中). Values displayed next to each bar.

evidence.svgInspection: 8 data rects alternating #10b981 (opportunity/green) and #ef4444 (risk/red). Legend has 机会 with green swatch and 风险 with red swatch.

assertions.title: Donut/pie chart shows judgment state distribution

steps.observed: index.html loaded, 0 console errors

steps.expected: SVG with arc segments for judgment states
steps.observed: SVG (viewBox='0 0 200 200') found with 1 white center circle (r=47.5, donut hole) and 2 arc paths creating donut segments.
2 non-zero segments: orange (#f59e0b) for 短热噪音 (3 directions) and gray (#6b7280) for 需要补证据 (4 directions). 值得跟=0 and 观察中=0 correctly omitted as zero-count arcs.
Center text shows '7' and '方向总数'. Individual counts 3 and 4 also displayed.

evidence.svgInspection: Donut chart: circle r=47.5 fill=#ffffff (center hole), path stroke=#f59e0b (短热噪音, 3), path stroke=#6b7280 (需要补证据, 4). strokeWidth=35. Colors match spec: orange for 短热噪音, gray for 需要补证据.

assertions.issues: Data has 0 for 值得跟 and 观察中, so only 2 arcs rendered instead of 4. This is correct behavior — zero-count segments should not create arcs. If all 4 states had non-zero counts, 4 arcs would appear.

assertions.title: Judgment chart proportions match actual data

steps.action: Load frontend_dashboard.json and get judgment counts
steps.observed: today_judgments: 值得跟=0, 观察中=0, 短热噪音=3, 需要补证据=4, total=7
Arc 1 (orange/短热噪音): sweeps 154.3° = 42.9% of circle. Expected: 3/7 = 42.9%. Difference: 0.0%. Arc 2 (gray/需要补证据): sweeps 205.7° = 57.1% of circle. Expected: 4/7 = 57.1%. Difference: 0.0%.

steps.expected: Each segment within ±10% of expected proportion
steps.observed: Both arcs are exactly proportional (0.0% deviation). Well within ±10% tolerance.

assertions.title: Bubble matrix has quadrant background shading

steps.observed: direction-map.html loaded, 0 console errors

steps.expected: >=4 background rect elements with distinct fill colors
steps.observed: 4 rect elements found with distinct fills: #d1d5db (gray, bottom-left), #fca5a5 (red, bottom-right), #6ee7b7 (green, top-left), #fcd34d (yellow, top-right). Opacity 0.1-0.12.
Last rect at DOM index 3, first circle at DOM index 4. Rects render before (behind) circles, confirming correct z-order.
Quadrants: top-left (80,40 430x250), top-right (510,40 430x250), bottom-left (80,290 430x250), bottom-right (510,290 430x250). Full chart area covered.

evidence.domInspection: 4 rect elements: #d1d5db opacity=0.1, #fca5a5 opacity=0.1, #6ee7b7 opacity=0.12, #fcd34d opacity=0.1. 7 circle.bubble elements positioned within quadrants. Z-order: rects (indices 0-3) before circles (indices 4-10).

steps.expected: Tooltip div with fields for name, heat, opportunity, risk, judgment
steps.observed: div#bubble-tooltip exists with tooltip-title, tooltip-heat, tooltip-opportunity, tooltip-risk, tooltip-judgment spans. Initially display:none.

steps.action: Hover over first bubble (廓形风格)
steps.observed: After mouseover dispatch on first circle.bubble: tooltip display changed to 'block'. Title='廓形风格', heat=45, opportunity=45, risk=43, judgment='短热噪音'. All values match frontend_dashboard.json.
Screenshot captured showing tooltip positioned near bubble.
After mouseout dispatch: tooltip display returned to 'none'. Tooltip correctly hidden.

evidence.interactionTest: Mouseover: tooltip shown with correct data (廓形风格, heat=45, opp=45, risk=43, judgment=短热噪音). Mouseout: tooltip hidden (display=none).

frictions.description: SVG circle.bubble elements are not recognized as interactive elements by agent-browser snapshot -i. Had to use JavaScript eval to dispatch mouseover/mouseout events directly instead of using agent-browser hover command.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to dispatch MouseEvent('mouseover') and MouseEvent('mouseout') on the circle.bubble element directly.

frictions.description: VAL-VIS-020 specifies '4 arc segments' but the current streetwear data has 0 for 值得跟 and 观察中, resulting in only 2 visible arcs. The implementation correctly omits zero-count segments.
frictions.resolution: Accepted 2 arcs as correct behavior for data with only 2 non-zero judgment states. Colors match spec for the states that have data.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. Product-line comparison chart (VAL-VIS-010/011) shows opportunity vs risk with correct colors and legend. Judgment donut chart (VAL-VIS-020/021) renders proportional arcs matching data within 0% deviation. Bubble matrix (VAL-VIS-030) has 4 quadrant background rects with distinct colors behind bubbles. Tooltips (VAL-VIS-031) show/hide correctly with direction name, heat, opportunity, risk, and judgment state.
